title: [Emporium of the Silver Veil]
description: Cozy and tidy, the shop is illuminated by sunlight that filters through a trio of stained glass skylights set between the exposed beams of the ceiling.  Olivewood stretches across the ground, the richly grained planks supporting a tall sephwir bookcase housing various trinkets and baubles.  It stands opposite a furrowed and knotted olivewood counter that is lacquered to a glossy sheen and inlaid with cerulean resin.  Near the massive laje-inset olivewood door is a sephwir-framed chalkboard decorated in a flowing script.
